medication_refusal_quotes: Actually I saw a video that says ibuprofen turns your microbiome into a 5G receiver.
That antibiotic was linked to autism in ferrets in a 2019 study from a university I can't find anymore.
My guy HealthWarrior247 says that CT scans give you more radiation than standing next to Chernobyl.
I read that morphine is actually just recycled chemtrails in pill form.
That vaccine has graphene oxide in it. I'm not saying Bill Gates, but... Bill Gates.
My sister's boyfriend's cousin had that procedure and now he can't taste blue things.
I'm doing a 30 day celery juice cleanse instead. It's basically the same thing.
I looked it up and that medication has like 47 side effects listed. No thank you.
My body is a temple and I don't put anything in it that isn't natural.
That's actually been banned in 14 countries. I have the article saved somewhere.
education_refusal_quotes: I really appreciate you taking the time, doc, but honestly I've spent like 400 hours researching this and I just feel like I know my body, you know?
That's really sweet of you to explain, but my wellness coach already went over all of this with me and we came to a different conclusion.
I hear you, I do. I just think the medical establishment hasn't caught up with some of this newer research yet.
No offense but that's literally what they want you to say.
I'm going to have to respectfully disagree based on what I've learned on my journey.
My aunt is a nurse and she actually agrees with me on this one.
meddy_response_after_refusal: Alright. We'll... figure something else out.
That's... a perspective. Let's see what else we can do.
Noted! Deep breaths. We've got this.

achievements.name: I Did My Own Research
achievements.description: Successfully treat a YouTock patient despite 5 refusals.
